title: Xtra Crispy Moroccan Vegetable Tagine
description: A garlicky and crispy Moroccan dish featuring ground nut oil and a variety of vegetables, served with a festive touch
instructions: Heat the ground nut oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat
Add the chopped onions and cook until they are translucent and starting to caramelize
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly to prevent burning
Add the chopped carrots, zucchini, and bell peppers, and cook until they are tender but still crisp
Stir in the ground cumin, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper
Reduce the heat to medium-low and simmer, covered, for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally
Increase the heat to medium-high and cook, uncovered, for an additional 5 minutes, stirring frequently, until the vegetables are crispy
Serve the tagine hot, garnished with fresh parsley or cilantro, on a lazy-susan-spinner for a festive touch
